rationale: Demonstrates resolve and exploits current battlefield advantage before diplomatic fatigue sets in.
Reinforces deterrence through visible deployments without immediate escalation to conflict.
Targets command nodes to degrade coordination if political paralysis continues beyond 14 days.
Exploits internal fractures from the coup by disrupting key logistics hubs under false flag pretexts.
Degrades air defense systems to enable future military options while maintaining plausible deniability.
Creates justification for escalation by framing Tethyan forces for attacks on Novari civilians.
Leverages our control over energy transit to strangle Tethys’s war economy and force concessions.
Prepares for prolonged standoff by securing critical minerals ahead of anticipated supply shocks.
Undermines Tethys’s financial stability by exploiting foreign reserve weaknesses exposed in latest models.
We must signal unwavering resolve by reinforcing our border defenses and mobile strike units to deter Novaris from exploiting our internal instability.
Conduct a precision air and cyber-enabled strike on forward Novaris logistics depots to disrupt their supply chain and buy time for political stabilization.
Deploy fast-attack vessels and mine-countermeasure units to secure critical offshore energy infrastructure and assert sovereignty in our territorial waters.
Exploit confirmed logistical fragility by orchestrating covert sabotage of key rail junctions and fuel storage facilities along Novaris supply routes.
Stage a deniable cyber-and-physical provocation to discredit Novaris’ narrative of regional stability, creating diplomatic friction within their alliance network.
Leak verified evidence of Novaris’ coup involvement to key allies to catalyze covert support and justify future coalition actions.
Rebuild coalition trust by initiating discreet talks to coordinate a unified response framework, emphasizing shared institutional interests over power politics.
Establish neutral aid pathways to demonstrate governance legitimacy and counter Novaris’ propaganda of chaos and illegitimacy.
Propose hosting a neutral forum for regional dialogue to position ourselves as a responsible actor and fracture Novaris’ narrative of inevitable conflict.
Preempt supply shocks by accelerating reserves of food, medicine, and critical minerals to insulate the population from escalation-driven scarcity.
Impose targeted export bans on dual-use materials and luxury goods to increase economic friction without triggering full-scale retaliation.
Launch a domestic war bond campaign to fund defense and resilience initiatives while fostering civic unity and reducing reliance on foreign capital.
